events.summary: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Mike Wilkins | Mark Francis (series ends 1/5/2...)

prep.summary: You must review the alignment from the Arvy Prep sessions—specifically the shift to standardized portfolio value templates, the four-pillar operating model, and the strict five-minute presentation window per portfolio for the RV review. You also need to address critical follow-ups from your June 29 meeting with Mike—including the severe staffing constraints, the locked application rationalization spreadsheet linked to the hygiene fund, and the need for succession plans. Finally, prepare to discuss the unusable property loss model and the outstanding control test failure.
tasks: Convert all presentation slides to the newly standardized portfolio template prior to the upcoming Tech Fellows dry run.
Submit final updates to the locked application rationalization spreadsheet to leverage the fifty-million-dollar hygiene fund.
Draft succession planning placeholders for yourself and James to satisfy leadership requirements.
Investigate bringing Chris back part-time to address the critical P&C data architect gap and resolve the property loss model issues.
prep.title: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Mike Wilkins | Mark Francis (series ends 1/5/2...)

events.summary: Just In Time (JIT) Training Opportunity: IAM Security Cat...

prep.summary: You must finalize several outstanding Arvy prep deliverables—specifically updating all presentation slides to the new standardized portfolio template—before the upcoming review with RV. While John serves as the single point of contact for the finalized deck—which is housed in the Tech Fellows Box folder—you need to verify your portfolio slides focus on business value rather than rudimentary domain listings. Rehearsals must be scheduled prior to the Thursday session—meaning your slides require immediate lock-down.
tasks: Convert all your presentation slides to the newly approved portfolio template format focusing on business value and executive takeaways.
Coordinate with John to deposit your updated slides into the Tech Fellows Box folder prior to the scheduled dress rehearsal.
Update terminology on your slides—shifting from 'horizontal planning' to 'Cross-Portfolio Strategic Planning' as advised by Mark.
Confirm with Brenda that you are officially added to the Thursday lunch meeting with RV.
prep.title: Bi-weekly: Tech BoD (series ending 12/22/26)
